Bash(powershell -Command " @'' import { useRef } from ''react'' import { motion, useScroll, useTransform } from ''framer-motion'' const partners = [ { name: ''Cheers Wisdom'', desc: ''AI-powered research company driving study design and data analysis.'' }, { name: ''Amity University'', desc: ''Academic partner providing research methodology and ethics oversight.'' }, { name: ''Faubert Lab'', desc: ''World-renowned neuroscience lab contributing cognitive assessment protocols.'' }, ] export default function Partners() { const containerRef = useRef(null) const { scrollYProgress } = useScroll({ target: containerRef, offset: [''start end'', ''end start''] }) const y = useTransform(scrollYProgress, [0, 1], [60, -60]) return (

Research Collaboration

PARTNERS
{partners.map((partner, i) => (

{partner.name}

{partner.desc}

 ))}
) } ''@ | Out-File -FilePath ''src/components/Partners.jsx'' -Encoding utf8 ")

Bash(powershell -Command " @'' import { useRef } from ''react'' import { motion, useScroll, useTransform } from ''framer-motion'' const leaders = [ { name: ''Dr. Jocelyn Faubert'', role: ''Neuroscience Advisor'', bio: ''Director of Faubert Lab. Pioneer in perceptual-cognitive research.'', image: ''https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1560250097-0b93528c311a?w=400&h=500&fit=crop'' }, { name: ''Prof. Kanad Ray'', role: ''Academic Advisor'', bio: ''Amity University. Expert in computational intelligence and AI.'', image: ''https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1472099645785-5658abf4ff4e?w=400&h=500&fit=crop'' }, { name: ''Sohail Shaikh'', role: ''Founder, Cheers Wisdom'', bio: ''Product strategist leading sustainable creator ecosystems.'', image: ''https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519085360753-af0119f7cbe7?w=400&h=500&fit=crop'' }, ] export default function Leadership() { const containerRef = useRef(null) const { scrollYProgress } = useScroll({ target: containerRef, offset: [''start end'', ''end start''] }) const y = useTransform(scrollYProgress, [0, 1], [80, -80]) return (

Leadership

RESEARCH ADVISORS
{leaders.map((leader, i) => (

{leader.name}

{leader.role}

{leader.bio}

 ))}
) } ''@ | Out-File -FilePath ''src/components/Leadership.jsx'' -Encoding utf8 ")

Bash(powershell -Command "
@''
import { SmoothScrollProvider } from ''./context/SmoothScrollContext''
import CustomCursor from ''./components/CustomCursor''
import Hero from ''./components/Hero''
import ScrollRevealText from ''./components/ScrollRevealText''
import Stats from ''./components/Stats''
import Features from ''./components/Features''
import Creators from ''./components/Creators''
import Benefits from ''./components/Benefits''
import Partners from ''./components/Partners''
import Leadership from ''./components/Leadership''
import Footer from ''./components/Footer''

export default function App() {
  return (
    <SmoothScrollProvider>
      <CustomCursor />
      <div className=""grain"" />
      <main className=""relative"">
        <Hero />
        <ScrollRevealText />
        <Stats />
        <Features />
        <Creators />
        <Benefits />
        <Partners />
        <Leadership />
        <Footer />
      </main>
    </SmoothScrollProvider>
  )
}
''@ | Out-File -FilePath ''src/App.jsx'' -Encoding utf8
")
